post: Put the Founding documents on every students desk. Civics Champions fund Pocket Constitutions for classrooms, $25 can cover a class set. Share with a colleague who teaches civics or U. S. history.  https://bit.ly/4rzKQC5  #CivicsChampion  #CivicEducation  #Teaching  #K12

Tip screens are everywhere, 18%, 20%, 25%. Should the U. S. abolish tipping and shift pay into transparent prices and wages? Students can submit a Yes/No/In-between response by March 12. Whats your take?  https://bit.ly/3MPDtr1  #ThinkTheVote  #CivicEducation  #CivilDiscourse  #Economics

Quick class hook: Lincolns Gettysburg Address (1863) reframed the Civil War around equality + self-government. After the video, ask: What is the ‘unfinished work, and whos responsible for it?   https://bit.ly/4awbUMF  #GettysburgAddress  #CivicEducation

End-of-month momentum matters. Before February disappears, share 1 memorable A250 from the classroom and youve got a foothold for the semester. Drop a ✅ if youre in, and comment what topic youre teaching next so others can borrow ideas. 🔗  https://bit.ly/463KXxf  #CivicStarChallenge  #CivicEducation  #TeacherPlanning  #K12

The printed word still matters. Through a partnership with TEAM Concept Printing and the Bill of Rights Institute, Komori America was proud to support the production of 10,000 pocket-sized Bill of Rights booklets for students across 100 Chicagoland schools. This project highlights the role print continues to play in education, civic understanding, and community engagement, and the power of collaboration across our industry. 📽️ Watch the video to see how print, partnership, and purpose come together.  https://bit.ly/4abH4c8  #PrintMatters  #Community  #CivicEducation  #Komori  #Partnership  #Education

Black History Month brings tough, vital questions about freedom and citizenship to the forefront of the nations mind. Put the Constitution on students desks to help them grapple with these important issues: $10 = 10 Pocket Constitutions. Support a local teacher today:  https://bit.ly/40EsBAg  #CivicsChampion  #BlackHistoryMonth  #CivicEducation  #Constitution
